data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Documentation updated ✓. Files modified: (1) plugins/dso/docs/adr/0001-outbound-jira-bridge.md — bridge script description now lists CREATE, STATUS, COMMENT, LINK, UNLINK, REVERT as supported outbound event types; (2) plugins/dso/docs/contracts/bridge-alert-event.md — Purpose section adds link sync failure and link target not found alert conditions; Emitters table updated to include LINK/UNLINK trigger conditions; (3) plugins/dso/docs/contracts/revert-event.md — Bridge-Outbound Semantics section clarified for LINK/UNLINK (inverse Jira operation, BRIDGE_ALERT on failure); Relationship table updated.
